allow: Bash(npx shadcn@latest add slider select tabs dialog card badge label checkbox input separator scroll-area tooltip -y)

Bash(node -e "const iq = require\('image-q'\); console.log\(Object.keys\(iq.palette\)\); console.log\(Object.keys\(iq.image\)\); console.log\(Object.keys\(iq.distance\)\); const p = new iq.utils.Palette\(\); console.log\(Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(Object.getPrototypeOf\(p\)\)\);")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'comlink: {d[\\"gzip\\"]/1024:.1f}KB gzip, published {d[\\"publishedAt\\"][:10]}'\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('version:',j.version,'|','time latest:',j.time?.latest,'|','unpacked size:',j.dist?.unpackedSize,'|','dist size:',j.dist?.fileCount\)")
